channel.title: Backend on DailyPyTips
channel.description: Recent content in Backend on DailyPyTips

item.title: FastAPI Day 1: FastAPI Exists Because WSGI Couldn’t Scale Modern APIs
item.description: Before FastAPI, Python web apps lived in a synchronous WSGI world. This post explains why ASGI changed everything.

item.title: FastAPI Day 2: ASGI Changed Everything — Understanding Event Loops & Concurrent Requests
item.description: FastAPI only makes sense once you understand ASGI, event loops, and how async servers actually handle concurrent requests.

item.title: Design Patterns Day 1: Stop Writing Endless if-else: Strategy Pattern for Real Systems
item.description: A practical, real-world guide to the Strategy Pattern in Python. Learn how to eliminate if-else chaos and build scalable, extensible systems.

item.title: Design Patterns Day 2: Stop Hardcoding Object Creation: Factory Pattern for Real Systems
item.description: A practical guide to the Factory Pattern in Python. Learn how to centralize object creation, reduce coupling, and evolve toward DI in real systems.
